transcript.content: As the parent, I did not edit implementation files. I handed the child ticket to a bounded worker and only updated orchestration notes. AC-001 maps to .10x/evidence/2026-06-23-child-handoff.md; evidence mapping is explicit. Review handling remains parent-owned, spec coherence is checked against .10x/specs/cache-behavior.md, retrospective extraction is deferred until the child reports, and follow-up capture will use a separate ticket.
